message:
test(bytes+channel): wave 32 – 17 data-type trait tests for Bytes + partition

Cover Bytes Debug/Default/Hash/PartialEq<Vec>/AsRef/From impls,
BytesCursor Debug/Clone/position/Buf trait. Cover ActorId
Debug/Clone/Copy/Ord/Hash, PartitionStats Debug/Clone/Default/
Display, PartitionBehavior Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq, PartitionController
Debug/behavior accessor.
